code:
stateDiagram-v2
    direction LR

    [Education_StudentDB] --> SCHEDULED: Admin creates broadcast for distant future
    [Education_ContentCDN] --> PREPARING: Admin creates immediate broadcast (Education_LMS_Portal)

    SCHEDULED --> PREPARING: Pre-computation scheduler runs
    SCHEDULED --> CANCELLED: Admin cancels
    
    PREPARING --> READY: Async user fetch succeeds
    PREPARING --> FAILED: Async user fetch fails
    PREPARING --> CANCELLED: Admin cancels
    
    READY --> ACTIVE: Activation scheduler runs (Education_LMS_Portal)
    READY --> CANCELLED: Admin cancels
    
    ACTIVE --> EXPIRED: Expiration scheduler runs
    ACTIVE --> CANCELLED: Admin cancels via API
    ACTIVE --> FAILED: DLT event for group broadcast is consumed
    
    EXPIRED --> [Education_ClassroomService]
    CANCELLED --> [Education_StudentDB]
    FAILED --> [Education_GradeSync]
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育平台设计一个广播状态流转图。核心场景是：管理员在LMS门户创建广播，然后系统要处理预计算、激活、过期这些阶段。另外还要考虑失败和取消的兜底路径。
明白。我注意到您提到了两种创建场景——" distant future "和" immediate "，这会影响初始状态吗？还有，预计算调度器和激活调度器是两个独立的定时任务？
对，两种创建路径。远程广播先进SCHEDULED状态，等预计算调度器触发再转到PREPARING；即时广播直接从PREPARING开始。两个调度器独立，预计算负责把SCHEDULED推到PREPARING，激活调度器负责把READY推到ACTIVE。
好的，我先把主干画出来：从StudentDB到SCHEDULED是远程广播创建，从ContentCDN到PREPARING是即时广播创建。然后SCHEDULED通过预计算调度器流转到PREPARING。PREPARING之后有个异步用户获取的环节？
没错，PREPARING阶段要做异步用户获取。成功就到READY，失败就走FAILED。管理员在PREPARING和READY阶段都能取消。另外ACTIVE阶段有个特殊失败路径——如果是群组广播，DLT事件消费失败也要转到FAILED。
画好了PREPARING到READY、PREPARING到FAILED的分支，还有各阶段的CANCELLED出口。ACTIVE之后是EXPIRED吗？由过期调度器触发？
对，ACTIVE由过期调度器转到EXPIRED。最后三个终止状态要有数据去向：EXPIRED落到ClassroomService，CANCELLED回写StudentDB，FAILED需要GradeSync做补偿。
确认一下完整流向：EXPIRED→ClassroomService，CANCELLED→StudentDB，FAILED→GradeSync。还有ACTIVE的取消我标注了"via API"以区分其他阶段的手工取消，这样整个状态机就闭环了。
